gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/334)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/334)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ طَاعَةُ الْمَرْأَةِ نَدَامَةٌ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Obeying the woman is remorse’.
en.sarwar: 4. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Obeying the woman brings regret.’”
